query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.artistHandle, u.stripeAccountId, u.stripeAccountStatus FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Mosh%' OR u.artistHandle LIKE '%Mosh%' OR u.artistHandle LIKE '%Slimdoggy%' OR u.name LIKE '%Slimdoggy%' LIMIT 5; SHOW TABLES LIKE '%tip%'; SHOW TABLES LIKE '%payment%'; SHOW TABLES LIKE '%gift%';
